chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُصِيبُهُ الْجَنَابَةُ فَلَا يَجِدُ إِلَّا الثَّلْجَ أَوِ الْمَاءَ الْجَامِدَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 43 – The man is hit by the sexual impurity but he cannot find except for the snow or the frozen water

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/185)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/185)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَصَابَتْهُ الْجَنَابَةُ فِي لَيْلَةٍ بَارِدَةٍ يَخَافُ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ التَّلَفَ إِنِ اغْتَسَلَ قَالَ يَتَيَمَّمُ وَ يُصَلِّي فَإِذَا أَمِنَ الْبَرْدَ اغْتَسَلَ وَ أَعَادَ الصَّلَاةَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Ja’far Bin basher, from the one who reported it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about a man who is hit by the sexual impurity during a cold night, fearing upon himself of the damage if he were to wash’. Heasws said: ‘He should perform Tayammum, and he should pray Salaat. So when he is safe from the cold, he should wash and repeat the Salaat’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from al-Husayn from Ja‘far ibn Bashir from those whom he has mentioned who has said the following: “I once asked abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of one who experiences sexual relation during a cold night and is afraid for his life due to Ghusl (bath) because of cold. He (the Imam) said, ‘One must take Tayammum to perform Salah (prayer) and when safe from cold, take Ghusl (bath) and perform such Salah (prayer) again.’”
